languages.text: "Я даже не буду пытаться. Мы все давненько не видели хорошей драки, не так ли?"
"I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"
languages.original_text: "Я даже не буду пытаться. Мы все давненько не видели хорошей драки, не так ли?"

traits.locale_text: "I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"
"I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"
"I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"
"I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"

languages.text: 「そんなこと試そうとすらしないだろ。こんなに長い間、まともな試合なんて見てないんじゃないの？そう思わないか？」
languages.original_text: "I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"

languages.text: "Böyle bir şeye kalkışmam bile. Uzun zamandır iyi bir dövüş görmemiştik ya."
languages.original_text: "I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: "Böyle bir şeye kalkışmam bile. Uzun zamandır iyi bir dövüş görmemiştik ya."

languages.text: “我可不想。许久没有畅快地战斗了，你不觉得手痒么？”
languages.original_text: "I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: “我可不想。许久没有畅快地战斗了，你不觉得手痒么？”

languages.text: "Das werde ich nicht einmal versuchen. Wir haben seit langer Zeit keinen guten Kampf mehr gesehen, findet Ihr nicht?"
languages.original_text: "I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: "Das werde ich nicht einmal versuchen. Wir haben seit langer Zeit keinen guten Kampf mehr gesehen, findet Ihr nicht?"

languages.text: « Jamais de la vie. Depuis le temps que nous n'avons pas livré de combat digne de ce nom, avouez que ce serait dommage de se priver d'une occasion pareille. »
languages.original_text: "I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: « Jamais de la vie. Depuis le temps que nous n'avons pas livré de combat digne de ce nom, avouez que ce serait dommage de se priver d'une occasion pareille. »

languages.text: «No pienso ni intentarlo. Llevamos demasiado tiempo sin una buena pelea, ¿no crees?».
languages.original_text: "I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: «No pienso ni intentarlo. Llevamos demasiado tiempo sin una buena pelea, ¿no crees?».
